name: toc
title: TOC
description: Table of contents primitives for rendering section links with depth indentation and active states.

content.text: mb-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground font-mono
block py-1 text-xs font-mono transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring
Heading level (2 = h2, 3 = h3, etc). Values below 2 are treated as 2.
mb-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground font-mono
block py-1 text-xs font-mono transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring
Heading level (2 = h2, 3 = h3, etc). Values below 2 are treated as 2.
sticky top-24 w-full max-w-xs self-start py-0 pr-0
see the active heading update in the sidebar.

docs.description: Table of contents primitives for rendering section links with depth indentation and active states.

anatomy.name: Toc
anatomy.note: Root aside wrapper and optional heading label

anatomy.name: TocItem
anatomy.note: Individual TOC entry with depth/active styling

notes.title: Headless-friendly
notes.content: Toc/TocList/TocItem are presentation primitives. Pair them with your own heading tracking logic (e.g. IntersectionObserver or Fumadocs AnchorProvider).

notes.title: Depth
notes.content: Use the depth prop on TocItem to indent nested headings consistently (h2/h3/h4).
